items.title: Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German court
items.summary: A court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".

items.title: Gaza sisters win prize for turning rubble into reusable bricks
items.summary: Displaced teenagers Farah and Tala wanted to 'turn destruction into something useful'.

items.title: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.summary: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 英凱特王妃訪問義大利 罹癌後頭一遭
items.summary: 英國凱特王妃（Catherine Princess of Wales）13日抵達義大利北部城市雷焦艾米里亞（Reggio Emilia）進行2天訪問，是她2年多前宣布罹癌與接受...…

items.title: 美伊談判膠著恐重啟軍事行動  赫格塞斯：不需國會授權
items.summary: 美國和伊朗因條件談不攏，和談持續膠著，據傳總統川普正考慮恢復對伊朗軍事行動。戰爭部長（國防部長）赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）12日在國會聽證會上表示，若總統認為有必要，...…

items.title: 不讓中國有要脅籌碼 川普川習會前放話：解決伊朗不需中國幫忙
items.summary: 川習會前夕，川普對伊朗問題態度強硬，直言他並不期待中國協助結束與伊朗的戰爭，更宣稱不論透過和平或其他手段，美方最終都會取得勝利。  綜合外媒報導，川普在離開華盛頓前向媒體表示...…
